title: Mineproc
description: This mod adding computers and servers. You can create anything programms for example calculators or remote control. Faster, more compact and convenient variant for your redstone mechanisms.
body:
# About the mod
This mod adding computers and servers. You can create anything programms for example calculators or remote control. Faster, more compact and convenient variant for your redstone mechanisms. the mod also has a server, getter, sender, memory cells, controller, sun panels, flashcards, form crafter, etc.

Computer and monitor-computer has slots for memory, processors, videocard, energyblock and wi-fi card, if you click on monitor you opened console if you write "help" you can get information about all commands.

Getter-this block activate redstone where block get message

Sender-this block send message to block with ip where redstone is activated

Form crafter-this block can create cheaper memory cells and transistors.

Controller-if you clicking arrows controller send to the computer information(left-1 up-2, right-3, down-4) in radius 10 blocks.

Flashcard-you can find flashcard in the cartographer's chest(soon in the new custom dungeon).

If you have questions or problems you can join to my discord
# Languages

English

Poland-Polski

Russian-Русский

Ukrainian-Українська

# Download
1. download all libraries(Geckolib version 4.2.2 or upper and fabric-api)
2. download mod (fabricloader 0.15.7 or upper)
# Optionals
1. Roughly Enough Items (REI)
